description: dev-rules hooks. All logic in `scripts/dev_rules_hook.py` (executed directly via shebang; stdlib-only, no `uv run`). Subcommands: pre-edit, session-end, session-start. Session-scoped dedup state under `.claude/tmp/dev-rules/injected-<sid>.txt` — one line per injected `<category>:<key>` pair (e.g. `logging:general`, `logging:python`). Rulesets are organized as `rulesets/<category>/<key>.md`; the dispatcher auto-discovers every category subdirectory at runtime. PreToolUse on Write|Edit|MultiEdit injects each category's `general` (once per session per category) plus the language ruleset matching the target file's extension (once per session per `<category>:<language>`). SessionEnd deletes this session's state file; SessionStart sweeps orphan files older than 1 day. All hooks exit 0 unconditionally.

hooks.description: Inject general + language logging ruleset on first matching edit per session
Delete this session's dev-rules dedup state
Sweep orphan dev-rules dedup state files older than 1 day
